title: Black Vision
description: This resource-pack makes your game impossible to complete.
body:
# Black Vision 🎱  

**Black Vision** is a *challenge resource pack* that turns every block texture into a single black pixel.  
With every block looking identical, navigation becomes almost impossible — making Minecraft harder than ever before.  

### 💀 Features  
- Every block is **completely black**  
- Items and entities stay **unchanged**  
- Works in **Survival, Hardcore, and Adventure** modes  
- Perfect for **challenge videos** or trolling friends  

### ⚠️ Warning  
You’ll get lost. A lot.  
Once you install **Black Vision**, even your own house will feel like a labyrinth.  

### 🧱 Compatibility  
- Works with Minecraft **1.20+**  
- Compatible with **OptiFine** and **Vanilla**  
- No performance impact — just pure darkness
